name: Cookie Ice Cream Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1/2 gallon mint chocolate chip ice cream
1 jar chocolate fudge or hot fudge syrup, heated
Cookie crums or chocolate pieces -- optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush Oreo cookies in a blender until they are a powdered consistency.
2. Mix the melted butter and crushed cookies together.
3. Press the mixture into a 9x13 cake pan suitable for freezing.
4. Freeze for 15 minutes, then top with softened ice cream.
5. Return to freezer until solid.
6. Spread heated fudge syrup over the ice cream and cookies, then freeze again.
7. (Optional) Add creme de mint liquor at this time and freeze again.
8. Spread Cool Whip over the top and decorate with chocolate sprinkles or pieces if desired.
9. Freeze overnight.
